description: Curated NeuroVault pharma/drug/placebo collections and relabeling schema. Prevents label collapse into generic task semantics. Every pharma label must include at least: drug + control/state + measure.
note: 3264 = control task battery (not drug manipulation); keep as task_control_battery, not pharma.

label_schema.canonical_format: drug=<…> | control=<…> | measure=<…> | task=<…> | contrast=<…> | group=<…>
do_not_pollute_rules: Separate sources: drug_challenge, task_on_drug_null, placebo_expectancy, meta_analysis, task_control_battery
For collections with metadata gaps (3713, 3666): drop/flag images missing mandatory metadata
Require every pharma label to include at least: drug + control/state + measure

source_buckets.task_on_drug_null: Task-on-drug where drug had no detectable effect (pooled)
source_buckets.task_control_battery: Control tasks for pharma studies (excluded from pharma)

collections.label_note: Add drug/control + seed explicitly; keep CBF as own measure
Critical: label as effect=Ki→(behavior) under each drug condition, not generic task
Split drug dose effect from gene expression effect; label dose and PPARγ separately

collections.note: Some images lack metadata; flag or drop

collections.label_note: Treat as drug_state=abstinent vs drug_state=SAU, not generic threat task

collections.note: Drug had no detectable effect; maps collapsed across drug sessions
Naltrexone blocks placebo effects; good placebo/opioid supervision
Expectancy vs treatment dissociation; don't mix with drug challenges
Not acute drug; label as meta_addiction_reward
